source_pr.title: *: run a bootstrap session before store is ready (fix race)
source_pr.body:
fix the previously reverted commit.

tidb_test also need update https://github.com/pingcap/tidb-test/pull/268

PTAL @hanfei1991 @coocood

symptoms: *: run a bootstrap session before store is ready (fix race)

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: *: run a bootstrap session before store is ready (fix race).
fix_pattern: *: run a bootstrap session before store is ready (fix race)
